identity.mission: Create a 'Modern Consultant' aesthetic that is authoritative yet energetic. Break away from the 'boring corporate' while avoiding 'flashy startup' vibes.
anti_patterns: No pure black (#000000) or pure gray (#808080).

typography.rules: Headings must be 'Outfit'. Body must be 'Plus Jakarta Sans'. Use tight tracking for headings.

buttons.primary: bg-lime-600 hover:bg-lime-700 text-white shadow-md transition-all duration-200 ease-out hover:shadow-lg rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-lime-50 text-lime-700 hover:text-lime-800 transition-colors rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_2px_8px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] overflow-hidden
cards.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-sm rounded-xl
cards.interactive: hover:border-lime-300 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 p-6

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-lime-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

rubric_selector.item: border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-lime-400 hover:bg-lime-50/50 transition-all

rules: Ensure text-to-background contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1.
Never use color alone to convey meaning (add icons or text labels).
Focus states must be clearly visible (ring-2 ring-lime-500).

instructions_to_main_agent: Add the Google Fonts link to 'public/index.html'.
Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors and fonts.
Implement the 'Rubric Selector' as a custom component, not just radio buttons.
For the Executive Dashboard, use the 'Bento' grid layout.
Ensure the 'Lime' accent is used sparingly (approx 10% of UI) to maintain the 'Consulting Polish'.
All API calls should be mocked for the demo, but structured to easily swap for real endpoints.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
